Alright, so this is your promotional calendar for the Black Friday play. Now, first of all, put the poster up the weekend before. So Black Friday is on Friday, the Friday before, the Saturday before, you should have that poster up and ready to go, which means you may need to order ASAP. Now, the first thing you're going to do is put a Facebook live in the group announcing. So maybe the Monday before Black Friday, excited, hey guys, I don't know if you heard of Prestige doing their first ever Black Friday deal. I know you guys love the pre-workout. Am I right 5AM peeps? Get excited. If you're excited, they will get excited. But if you're just like, hey, there's a deal, they won't do anything. And then there's the sequence for you to text now, whether you're using Scipio front, doing this individual from a phone, doesn't matter, but this would be the rough sequence. The Monday before Black Friday is sending out a text. Wednesday before Black Friday, reminding them, these purposely have spelling and grammatical errors because we found that that tends to be more relatable and less automated on text sequences. Friday 7AM, you're going to send them the link plus the code. And then here's the in-gym announcements. Now, what I would do is print these on a sheet, have them by like your coach's station or where the radio is so they know to do it. But these announcements should be read every day and every class for that week. So you have from the coaches to say what's going on. Then on Black Friday, AM, you are going to do a Facebook Live in your community group. Do it bright and early. Tag a bunch of people and be like, hey, guys, what's going on? I know one of the things that I would do is definitely say what pack you're ordering. And if you haven't ordered and taken advantage of the deal, then you're not being genuine. So do it. But also, I would grab a member who's in the gym that I know has already purchased something and be like, Susie, which package did you get? Oh, I got the fast results packs like get extra burn AM. That will go a long way to get that social proof into there. Now, this is optional and this is kind of going off the old Black Friday play. But what I would do is either a live or a pre-recorded video every day with one of the coaches talking about which free sup they're going to get in why. So example, Coach Stephanie gets on there and goes, hey, guys, it's Coach Stephanie and the free stuff that I'm going to get on Black Friday is burn AM. I love the way it makes me feel all warm in the morning. Plus since it's in taking him, Ab is never been on fire and she shows her abs and everyone's like, woo, Stephanie. But again, it gets people to reminder because they will not see all these messages and texts. And so here's one from Coach Dave. Do it with your actual coaches and subs that they actually like. Personal gym post. I think this is also a great place for you to get some extra business where you might be able to say, hey, guys, this is the promotion we're doing for my gym. Check this out. There's a deal we got going on and that's all right here as well. So we've provided all of that for you. Just follow the sheet, do it and make lots of subs.
